summary: First end-to-end testing of SkillSphere MVP. Created comprehensive pytest backend suite (41 tests) covering Auth, Courses, Quizzes, Jobs, AI fallback chain, Chat, Notifications, Payments, Admin and Hidden SuperAdmin. All 41 backend tests PASS (100%) after fixing one critical bug. Frontend smoke tested: Landing, Courses (9 cards), Jobs (5 roles), AI Assistant page and hidden SuperAdmin login page all render correctly. Login flow potentially has a frontend redirect/token-storage issue that needs verification.

integration_issues.issue: After submitting valid seeded credentials (student@skillsphere.demo / Student@123) on /login, page stays on /login with cleared fields and no token detected in common localStorage keys (token/access_token/skillsphere_token). Backend /api/auth/login itself returns 200 correctly when called via curl/pytest. Likely either (a) frontend uses a different storage key, (b) form submits but redirect logic doesn't fire, or (c) onSubmit handler not wired to button. Needs main agent verification — could simply be the playwright button-locator clicked the wrong element. Other unauthenticated pages (courses, jobs, AI, SuperAdmin) all render properly.

action_items: Verify the student login flow end-to-end in the browser manually: confirm token is stored (check the storage key actually used by AuthContext) and that the app redirects to /dashboard after a successful POST /api/auth/login. If the issue is a real bug, fix the redirect/storage logic in /app/frontend/src/pages/Auth.jsx or its AuthContext.

Optional: clean up TEST_ data created during testing — one 'TEST Trainer Course' course (and its duplicates) and one 'TEST QA Engineer' job were created in DB by the backend test suite and now appear on public listings.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED by tester: /app/backend/routes/admin.py used Motor attribute access for an underscore-prefixed collection (db._sa_audit) which Motor disallows -> caused 500 on POST /api/private/internal/.../auth and would have broken every SuperAdmin write path. Replaced all 4 occurrences with db['_sa_audit'] (lines ~103, ~116, ~129, ~139).
Hidden SuperAdmin design correctly returns 404 for wrong secret/password and uses env-only validation (never stored in DB) — verified by DB query in pytest.
Quiz detail endpoint correctly hides 'correct_index' from client — verified.
Role-based access enforced: student gets 403 on POST /api/courses and POST /api/jobs; admin endpoints reject students with 403 — verified.
AI fallback chain works: POST /api/ai/chat returned provider='openai' (GPT-5.2 primary) with a real reply.
Stripe checkout: POST /api/payments/checkout returns checkout URL and persists payment_transactions — verified.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (5/6 surfaces rendered/works; login redirect needs verification)

test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Seeded accounts validated working via login: student@skillsphere.demo/Student@123, trainer1@skillsphere.demo/Trainer@123, recruiter@skillsphere.demo/Recruiter@123, admin@skillsphere.demo/Admin@123. SuperAdmin (env-only, NOT in DB): root@skillsphere.internal / <REDACTED_PASSWORD> / <REDACTED_SECRET>.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest run created: (1) a few TEST_ student users via /api/auth/register, (2) 'TEST Trainer Course' courses (one per test run) under trainer1, (3) 'TEST QA Engineer' job(s) under recruiter, (4) one job application from student. These now appear in public catalogue and job listings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is 100% green via /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. The single fix applied was the Motor _sa_audit collection access pattern in /app/backend/routes/admin.py. Frontend login flow needs a manual re-verification by the main agent — there's a chance my playwright click targeted the wrong button or AuthContext stores tokens under a non-standard key. Hidden SuperAdmin frontend page at /private/internal/core-access-x7k9m2 renders correctly with Email/Password/Secret-token fields. Test data prefixed with TEST_ may need cleanup before next regression run.
rca of the issue: RCA — SuperAdmin login 500 error: server.py creates the Motor AsyncIOMotorDatabase via db.py. Motor blocks attribute-style access for collection names beginning with underscore (e.g. db._sa_audit) and raises AttributeError, which FastAPI converts to a 500. admin.py used db._sa_audit at 4 call sites (sa_login, sa_audit list, sa_ban, sa_set_role). Reproduction: POST /api/private/internal/core-access-x7k9m2/auth with the valid env credentials -> 500 with 'AsyncIOMotorDatabase has no attribute _sa_audit' in backend.err.log. Mitigation: switched to dictionary-style access db['_sa_audit'] which Motor allows for any collection name. Retested via pytest: TestSuperAdmin.test_sa_login_success now passes (200 + token) and test_sa_dashboard_with_headers also passes.
